title: Guardian relationship catalog
description: Reference catalog of the guardian relationship enum + display labels + bucket mapping (used by analytics + display).

relationships.label: Sibling (adult)
relationships.note: Adult sibling acting as guardian for a minor sibling. Requires explicit legal_guardian appointment.

relationships.label: Legal guardian
relationships.note: Court-appointed guardianship. Non-family or family with formal legal appointment.

relationships.label: Foster parent
relationships.note: Foster placement — legal custody typically held by the state, but foster parent authorised for day-to-day decisions.

relationships.label: Other
relationships.note: Free-text catch-all. Enter details in the notes field.

notes: `typical_legal_custody` is a UI hint only — the actual has_legal_custody flag is set independently by the admin recording the guardianship. A step-parent may hold legal custody if legally appointed; a biological parent may not (custody stripped in some legal proceedings).
The `bucket` column feeds analytics — analytics events use bucket instead of raw relationship to keep label cardinality bounded.
